Paṭisambhidāmaggaṭṭhakathā/X/X/117.text: Gulāguṇḍikajātoti (Sī), kulāguṇḍikajātoti (Pāḷiyaṁ) Dī 2. 45; Saṁ 1. 318 piṭṭhesu ca tadaṭṭhakathāsu ca passitabbaṁ.

Paṭisambhidāmaggaṭṭhakathā/X/X/163.text: (Anukkamato oḷārika-assāsapassāsanirodhavasena kāyadarathe vūpasante kāyopi cittampi lahukaṁ hoti, sarīraṁ ākāse laṅghanākārappattaṁ viya hoti.) (Visuddhi 1. 274 piṭṭhe)

Paṭisambhidāmaggaṭṭhakathā/X/Catutthasut.text: Yañca bhayatupaṭṭhāne ñāṇanti (Sī) 2. Saṁ 2. 261; Ma 1. 326; Ma 3. 328 piṭṭhādīsu.

Paṭisambhidāmaggaṭṭhakathā/Yuganaddhavag.text: Bojjhaṅgāti vuttaṁ hoti (Sī, Ka), idaṁ vuttaṁ hoti (Abhi-Ṭṭha 2. 296 piṭṭhe) Saṁ-Ṭṭha 3. 176 piṭṭhe pana passitabbaṁ.

Paṭisambhidāmaggaṭṭhakathā/Paññāvagga/X/.text: Samaṇakaraṇīyakathā nāma Mahānāmatherena katā abhinavasaṁvaṇṇanāti gaṇṭhipade vuttaṁ.
Bakkulassa (Sī), Bākkulassa (Visuddhi 2. 7 piṭṭhe), Aṁ-Ṭṭha 1. 236; Ma-Ṭṭha 3. 135 piṭṭhesupi.
Tattakapālaṁ (Sī, Ma-Ṭṭha 3. 136 piṭṭhe ca) 3. Gilito (Ka) 4. Vutthatthaṁ (Ka)
